title: Comparison matrix task
prompt: Given two hypothetical model variants A and B with scores (latency ms, quality 0–1): A=(120, 0.82), B=(95, 0.88). Emit a brief explanation, then describe how you would encode this as a grid `ComparisonMatrix` JSON with row labels [A,B] and column labels [latency_ms, quality] (values only in the scores grid).

execution.notes: Structured comparison outputs; rubric scores the explanation and matrix plan.
